case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. GADELAWIT GEBRIEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66432623) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 67238127)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GEBRIEL, GADELAWIT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-2020

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEBRIEL, GADELAWIT $1,823.52 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,082.47, ***$521.00 CREDIT WAS DEDUCTED FOR $2344.52 PRINCIPAL.*** SEE SCANNED DOC
